word: G714 - ἀρκέω - arkéō - ar-keh'-o - Be content

sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
to be possessed of unfailing strength; to be strong, to suffice, to be enough

ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: Apparently a primary verb (but probably akin to G142 through the idea of raising a barrier); properly to ward off, that is, (by implication) to avail (figuratively be satisfactory): - be content, be enough, suffice, be sufficient.
